title: School Readiness Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > School Readiness Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LATINO NETWORK JUNTOS APRENDEMOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A culturally-specific early childhood education program focused on kindergarten readiness. Parent curriculum focuses on teaching strategies, positive communication skills, advocacy, and navigating the public school system. Child curriculum focuses on early literacy while developing classroom-based social skills. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Ages 3-6 -Children who turn 3 before December 31 and 6 after September 2 are also eligible Hours: Occurs 30 weeks per school year Email (503) 283-6881 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK SOÑANDO JUNTOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits with a focus on school preparation and healthy development. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 0-6 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK JUNTOS AL KINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with kindergarten readinesss through 8 classes for parents and children during the summer, also includes 2 workshops for parents with a focus on to support children's deleopment at home. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Children entering kindergarten in the current year Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 283-6881 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK P3 COORDINATORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides play groups, kindergarten readiness, and leadership development (focusing on parents' engagement within the school setting). 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Play and Learn Groups: Pregnant individuals in any trimester and ages 0-5 -Early Kindergarten Transition (EKT)/Parent Cafe: Must have a child who will enter or attend a participating school Hours: Varies by event Email (503) 283-6881 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK JUNTOS APRENDEMOS
